---
title: "Welcome to PageSieve"
---

PageSieve is a browser extension for declarative web scraping. It allows you to define field names and CSS/XPath selectors to extract structured data from any website you visit.


## Demo

{{< video /assets/PageSieve-DemoVideo1.mp4  >}}

## Key Features

- **Point-and-click selection**: Easily discover CSS selectors for any element.
- **Minimal Sidebar UI**: No need to leave your current tab.
- **Local-first**: All scraping is performed entirely within your browser.
- **Reusable Recipes**: Save and share your scrape configurations as JSON files.

## Explore the Docs

- [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd)
- [UI Overview](reference/ui.qmd)
- [Architecture](architecture.qmd)
- [Scrape Configuration Reference](reference/configuration.qmd)
- [Examples](examples/index.qmd)
